finding_results.notes: Removed pre-existing hymnbook marker/cipher mechanics and replaced with a one-off panic stash in a single binder while preserving surviving evidence fragments.
Kept the intimacy scene on-page through completion, added explicit physical progression, and included bodily consequence (wrist marks) tied to Ina's misread of Minjae's intention.
Expanded the six-hour survival window into dramatized transactions (camera sale and debt payment) with counterpart dialogue and explicit cost/outcome for each.
Introduced an alternate freeze hypothesis, added an active test by Ina, and preserved uncertainty until Minjae's explicit admission in confrontation.
Replaced template freeze wording with concrete stress action (tool handling plus controlled breath) during the betrayal rupture beat.
Reworked confrontation register to high-contraction pressure speech, added an interruption beat, and preserved one deliberate formal line as emotional/legal defense.

Bridge exchange now separates idiolect under pressure: Ina frames harm through narrative/ethical optics, while Minjae anchors his turns in family and route logistics. The scene now includes multiple interruptive beats (cutoff, overlap, unfinished clause) to break polished rebuttal cadence.

Ina and Minjae dialogue in the flagged span is now consistently high-contraction with colloquial pressure texture; contractible full forms were tightened, and no repetitive unmotivated formality remains in the target range.

Recast the three cited fragment clusters into complete clauses with varied syntax, including adjacent status beats in the first cluster, while preserving urgency, close-third pressure, and raw consequence detail.

pass_summaries.summary: All six packet findings were addressed in chapter_13 with structural/craft priority: continuity-safe evidence retrieval, unsanitized on-page intimacy consequences, dramatized survival transactions, restored pre-admission uncertainty, sharper betrayal rupture action, and pressure-authentic dialogue register.

Addressed all packet findings for chapter_13 p2 dialogue/idiolect/cadence: revised the bridge confrontation for stronger voice separation and interruptive pressure cadence, and normalized Ina/Minjae contraction usage to high-register spoken realism.

Completed prose/copyedit pass for chapter_13 and resolved the packet's clipped-fragment recurrence by rewriting all cited spans into grammatically complete, varied sentence forms without softening scene intensity.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=9, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
